title: reinwardtia glabra
intro: Reinwardtia glabra, also known as the smooth reinwardtia or Chinese angelica tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Reinwardtia glabra include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and promoting digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
